overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars game showing a hooded protagonist walking through a desert canyon during golden hour, accompanied by a small droid companion. The character approaches a massive natural rock arch formation while traversing sandy and rocky terrain, with high-fidelity Unreal Engine rendering and cinematic desert lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert canyon with distant rock arch

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through sandy desert canyon toward a distant rock arch formation visible on the horizon

notable_agents.action: small droid companion following closely behind the protagonist

entered.detail: tall red rock canyon wall forming the left boundary of the desert valley
tall red rock canyon wall forming the right boundary of the desert valley
sandy desert floor with visible footprints and ripples
large natural rock arch visible in the distant center of the canyon
small boulders and rock debris scattered across the sand
sparse dry bushes and desert vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a hooded character walking through a wide desert canyon during golden hour. The terrain is sandy with sparse vegetation, flanked by tall red rock canyon walls on both sides. A small droid follows behind as the character moves toward a distant rock arch formation visible in the center horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert approach to arch formation

events.description: ground surface transitions from soft sand to rocky gravel terrain as approaching the arch

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through increasingly rocky terrain as the rock arch formation grows larger on the left side

notable_agents.action: droid companion maintaining pace behind the character

entered.detail: prominent rock formation jutting from the ground on the right side
tall thin rock spire or tower visible in the far distance beyond the arch

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the canyon as the terrain becomes rockier and the ground transitions from sand to gravel. The rock arch formation moves from the center to the left side of the frame and grows significantly larger, indicating the character's approach. Large rock outcrops appear on the right while the canyon walls remain visible in the distance.

events.description: character begins turning left toward the rock arch formation

agents.ego_description: turning left and approaching the massive rock arch, preparing to investigate or pass through it

notable_agents.action: droid companion following as the character turns toward the arch

entered.detail: tall rock pillars and formations near the base of the arch

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character turns left toward the massive rock arch which now dominates the left side of the frame at close range. The terrain is fully rocky with large pillars visible near the arch's base. The right canyon wall fades into the distance as the character focuses on approaching the arch formation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide desert canyon that gradually narrows as the character approaches a massive natural rock arch. It begins with a third-person view of a hooded character and a small droid traversing sandy terrain flanked by tall red rock walls under the glow of golden hour. As the character advances, the ground transitions from soft sand to rugged gravel and the distant rock arch shifts toward the left of the frame, growing significantly in scale. The scene then opens up to reveal large rock outcrops on the right before the camera turns left, bringing the towering arch into close range. Finally, the right canyon wall fades into the distance as the character moves across a fully rocky landscape toward the pillars at the base of the formation.
